title: Doubles Useless stuff
description: It adds a lot of unnecessary stuff to Minecraft!
body:
Welcome to Doubles Useless Stuff Mod!
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59c97b47ef361e60f91eba21c444ee332d0657d0.png)
This Mod Adds

Pickaxes, Swords, Axes, Blocks, Katanas, Mobs, Hoes, Shovels, And whole lot more 
There is so much fun and cool Things like Ruby Stuff, Scary Mob, and even Katanas Ill try to keep updating the Mod and If you want something to be Added to this mod Comment on this video and ill maybe add it! Video: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ADvAgx0O_6I](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ADvAgx0O_6I)

Tools:
--------------------------
Ruby Sword, Hoe, Axe, Pickaxe, And Shovel.
Katana
Wind Wand
Wind Ability

Blocks:
--------------------------
Ruby Ore
Block Of Ruby
Block Of Silence

Recipes:
--------------------------
Ruby Tools 
Block of ruby

Entitys:
--------------------------
The One Who Lives in the Shadows

Dimensions:
--------------------------
Ruby Dimension

Biomes:
--------------------------
Ruby Biome

(btw you dont have to get you can choose but if you are interested in it go ahead and try it.
